name: Blender Sweet-Sour Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Frozen Pineapple Juice - Concentrate; 1 Can
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients in a blender container.
2. Blend until the pimiento slice and green pepper are finely chopped.
3. Pour the mixture into a saucepan.
4. Cook and stir until the mixture thickens and becomes bubbly.
5. Continue cooking for an additional 1 minute.
6. Use as a basting sauce for meat during the last few minutes of broiling or roasting.
Makes 1 1/4 cups.
